metadata.description: Nick Love's personal plugin marketplace — 33 skills across 6 plugins for content creation, design, documents, web dev, automation, and skill management.

plugins.name: content-creation
plugins.description: Writing, copywriting, email, carousel, and research skills for content creators and marketers.

plugins.name: design-tools
plugins.description: AI image prompting, logo creation, canvas design, algorithmic art, design system, and diagramming tools.

plugins.name: document-tools
plugins.description: Create and manipulate Word docs, PDFs, PowerPoint presentations, and Excel spreadsheets.

plugins.name: web-dev
plugins.description: Full-stack frontend development, landing page design and copy, browser automation with Playwright, and UI auditing.

plugins.name: automation-tools
plugins.description: Make.com automations, Chrome browser control, Canva design, scheduled tasks, NotebookLM queries, and Facebook Ads.

plugins.name: meta-skills
plugins.description: Tools for building, discovering, and managing Claude skills and plugins. Includes recursive problem solving.
